title: microsorum membranifolium
intro: Microsorum membranifolium, also known as the membrane-leaf Microsorum, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Asia, particularly in the Philippines and Indonesia. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Microsorum membranifolium include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, and its leaves can also be dried for further processing into capsules or supplements.
